name: Alucon Public Company Limited
summary: Alucon Public Company Limited produces and distributes aluminum containers primarily in Thailand. The company operates in two segments, Can and Tube, and Slug. It offers aluminum collapsible tubes, monobloc aerosol cans, bottles, and rigid wall containers, as well as marker pen bodies. The company also provides aluminum slugs for impact extrusion; and technical impact extrusions, blank aluminum slugs, aluminum coils, aluminum pellets, strips, plates, etc. Its products are used for hair color products, medical creams, adhesives, etc. The company exports its products to approximately 40 countries, including Japan, Australia, the United States, Indonesia, and South Africa. Alucon Public Company Limited was founded in 1961 and is headquartered in Mueang Samut Prakan, Thailand.
